We believe, working in partnership with our clients, combined with a 'can do' attitude, delivers results that everyone can be proud of.
 
Bark is privileged to manage a number of high profile and prestigious gardens and grounds across New Zealand. Only the highest level of presentation and professional standard is acceptable on these properties.

 

Our award winning reputation is built on mutual respect and consistent delivery of our great service and high standards. We insist on working in partnership with our clients, knowing when both parties are aligned; sharing the same vision and objective, the very best results are realised.

Improving the visual amenity of a space has the power to transform how a community thinks, feels and acts; it can inspire progress, community spirit, nurture conservation and improve health.

HEB Construction¡¯s commercial landscape division, HEB Landscapes take pride in their work because they know their power lies in the delivery of projects that improves the quality of life for New Zealanders.

Their pride is demonstrated through the award winning work being undertaken by their two operational divisions in Canterbury and in Auckland, which also covers the regions of Waikato and the Bay of Plenty.

One of the many differentiators that HEB has in the landscape market, is the ability to draw on internal expertise from other sectors of construction; like utilities and bitumen surfacing, which provides a consistency of project ownership, quality and reliability.

On the mainland, the Canterbury team is reshaping the regional landscape. As Cantabrians, they acknowledge the resource demands upon the Christchurch market during the rebuild and have a team of specialists to handle landscaping demand.

HEB is proud of the outcomes achieved by transforming environments. These benefits can be seen across the many projects undertaken in urban landscaping, main highway enhancement, footbridges and boardwalks, DOC walking tracks, reserves, parks and open spaces, restaurants, bars and precincts, hard and soft landscaping, sports fields, foreshores and wetlands and environmental improvement works.

While each operational team has their own distinct essence they both deliver quality products cross a variety of disciplines.

HEB Landscapes is ready to help you transform the environment for your community.

Website: 
outerspaces.co.nz
Established in 2007, Outer Spaces Landscaping is the brainchild of husband & wife co-directors Adrian Whistler & Desiree Perham. Together they created a company that strives to blend natures own dramatic offerings of plant, light, water and vista to create landscapes which are functional yet still appeal to the senses.

Sighting works by Made Wijaya and Jamie Durie as early inspiration, Adrian first found his passion for plants and landscapes by way of travel in the mid nineties through Indonesia, Europe & Mexico. Over the ensuing years he has developed his knowledge of coastal, native and subtropical gardens, paving and landscape construction through the development of several of his own properties and then through the conception of his first business as a landscaping & property maintenance contractor in 2001. An increasing demand for his landscaping services prompted Adrian & Desiree to concentrate their focus entirely on landscaping and so established Outer Spaces Ltd in 2007.

Since then the company has flourished and now employs seven full-time staff including a landscape architect and qualified landscapers, one of whom gained his qualifications under Adrian's tutorage.

Design and Build

For clients who want their functional objectives met with the just the right amount of creativity and aesthetics to suit their tastes and budgets, Outer Spaces will deliver. They do not follow standard templates, instead preferring an individual approach to each project. They offer a complete design and build service but happily offer plan-only or plant-only projects or implement plans supplied by other designers.

The team at Outer Spaces Ltd take great pride in their work feel fortunate to be based in a beautiful corner of the country and doing something that they love and are passionate about.

Landscape Group specialises in the project management, design and installation of aspirational landscapes for high end residential and commercial properties throughout New Zealand.

Our expertise span the entire project management process, from planning and design, through to onsite supervision and project delivery. We offer ongoing maintenance and care of completed projects. We work closely with our clients to understand their desired outcomes. Our technical knowledge and project management processes ensure we facilitate a successful project from start to finish.

Through creative collaborative efforts with clients and design professionals, we create both classic and contemporary landscapes that address the inherent qualities and requirements of a particular site while delivering on time, and on budget.

?

Our business is guided by a sustainable design philosophy; we source local building materials and only plant species beneficial to the ecosystem. We emphasize native and diverse planting material where possible.
 
Our team led by Jason Adams, has successfully implemented timeless design solutions and project management throughout New Zealand.

The Sealer Guy
Eco-Friendly Hard Surface Cleaning And Sealing
If your once-beautiful stone and concrete surfaces are now discolored, faded, cracked or muddy, you¡¯ve just found a solution. The Sealer Guy provides expert, hard-surface cleaning and sealing services.

Our team of professionals have over 30 years¡¯ experience to help protect and enhance your high-quality residential and commercial properties with expert cleaning, sealing and restoration of concrete, tile and stone surfaces, including patios, poolside areas, terraces, garden paths, driveways and car parks. In addition to helping protect your investment in new construction, we can also provide maintenance and restoration solutions for any existing hard surfaces.

 

Why Choose Us?

Postal Address: 
Paul Green
All Garden Works
PO Box 333
Thames

Paul Green one of the principal partners in the firm, started an apprenticeship in 1961 at the Government Gardens in Rotorua. In 1964, Paul transferred his apprenticeship to Duncan and Davies Nurseries in New Plymouth to experience the commercial side of Horticulture. 
The next six years was spent in this great nursery, first as an apprentice then 9 years as a foreman, at one of the Waitara nursery blocks growing a wide range of open ground grown plants. 
Paul and wife, Irene, moved to Thames in 1973 and re-opened an abandoned Garden Centre at Totara, South of Thames. In 1980, Paul and Irene purchased a 4-acre block just south of Thames and started AeroView Garden Centre, they then branched into landscaping which fitted in well with the Garden Centre, in 1989 the business was sold and Paul was involved in the building business in varying sectors until 2001.
The desire to work outdoors and back in the landscape industry was the start of "ALL GARDEN WORKS"
